name: Invoice Processing & Approval Automation

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model, temperature: $json.temperature, stream: false, messages: $json.messages }) }}

parameters.functionCode:
return [{ json: {
  status: 'approved',
  code: 200,
  invoiceId: $json.invoiceId,
  vendor: $json.vendor,
  amount: $json.amount,
  approvedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  approvedBy: 'Auto',
  aiExtraction: $json.invoice,
  model: 'gpt-oss:120b-cloud',
  message: 'Invoice auto-approved (<=$499 threshold)'
}}];

return [{ json: {
  status: 'pending_review',
  code: 202,
  invoiceId: $json.invoiceId,
  vendor: $json.vendor,
  amount: $json.amount,
  reason: 'Amount $' + $json.amount + ' exceeds auto-approval threshold ($499)',
  submittedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  aiExtraction: $json.invoice,
  model: 'gpt-oss:120b-cloud',
  message: 'Invoice queued for manual review',
  nextStep: 'Notify AP team / write to review queue'
}}];

description: Invoice Processing & Approval Automation workflow: AI extraction via local Ollama (text-only), auto-approves invoices <=$499, routes higher amounts to manual review. Webhook, manual, and schedule triggers supported. Stub outputs used for demo (no DB/email credentials required).
